commit.subject: LU-13239 ldiskfs: pass i_xtime down optimization (rhel 8.1)
commit.message:
LU-13239 ldiskfs: pass i_xtime down optimization (rhel 8.1)

Include the i_xtime optimization for rhel8.1 ldiskfs.

Cray-bug-id: LUS-7378, LUS-4880
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Icddc9e4a40b5270ba175197c980e9e16fb9aa42c
